Representation Abstraction.comment: It's a literal physics simulation that shows the softness of the objects.

Sound.comment: We can imagine some sound due to the breaking.

visualElements.comment: The object is a bit abstract looking and wouldn't necessarily be connected to the topic of softness.

visualChannels.comment: The breaking and deformation pattern of the ball when interacting with the pyramid depends on its softness.
It's the same variable as the breaking, but this maps the softer side of the spectrum.
The way it moves and bounces depends on the softness.

contextualAttributes.comment: The balls don't always have different materials so it doesn't seem a pattern of softness.

visualChannels.comment: It provides a reference to the hardness by breaking or not during the collision.

contextualAttributes.comment: The geometry here also acts as a reference due to the sharp edges.
The metallic material can also be used as reference here.

visualElements.comment: The scene is quite abstract looking, not so familiar or related to the data concept.

contextualAttributes.comment: The environment here might be used in a subtle way to provide context.
